raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The High-Speed Rail Office of the Inspector General reported that the California High-Speed Rail Authority has not completed a risk analysis for the M-B segment.",
    "The report states it is increasingly unlikely that the California High-Speed Rail Authority will complete the M-B segment on schedule.",
    "The projected budget for the California High-Speed Rail project ballooned from $34 billion to over $128 billion.",
    "Taxpayers face the reality of single-handedly funding massively inflated costs for the California High-Speed Rail project.",
    "The California High-Speed Rail Authority has spent $13.7 billion in total, including $1.6 billion on professional marketing materials and consultants.",
    "The only partially completed segment of the California High-Speed Rail project has cost $1.4 billion for 22 miles of raised dirt and includes 11 overpass structures.",
    "Zero feet of track have been laid to date for the California High-Speed Rail project.",
    "A former chair of HSRA’s peer review group testified that the project cannot be completed with the funding available.",
    "The state spends $1 billion annually on the High-Speed Rail, which could be better spent on protecting lives and infrastructure against natural disasters."
  ]
}
```
